title: dynamidium reptans
intro: Dynamidium reptans, also known as Wild Strawberry or Wood Sorrel, is a perennial flowering plant species in the family Oxalidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Dynamidium reptans contain high levels of vitamin C, which provides various health benefits such as immune system support and anti-aging properties. Dynamidium reptans can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also consumed raw in salads or as a garnish.
